heading: Special pay: members assigned to international military headquarters
label: 306a Special pay: members assigned to international military headquarters
text: Not more than nine members of the armed forces, including members detailed to international military headquarters, may be paid pay and allowances at rates referred to in section 625(d) of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 ().22 U.S.C. 2385(d)
